query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('classroomCourses','classroomSubmissions','classroomAssignments','subjects'); SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='subjects' AND COLUMN_NAME='isCorePlanning';
